subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Mizan
subcodes.first_line: The Hour hath come, and the Trumpet hath been sounded, and the Balance proclaimeth: "I am the All-Distinguishing, the All-Knowing, manifest and evident!" [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اتت الساعه و نفخ فی الصور و المیزان ینادی انا الممیز العلیم ابین و اظهر
subcodes.subjects: @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice, @apocalyptic imagery, @suffering and imprisonment
